text: A photograph of a street scene in a residential area. On the left, a two-story building with a blue ground-floor entrance and a second floor featuring a large window with horizontal bars. A man wearing a blue shirt stands near the entrance. To the right, a smaller, single-story structure is heavily damaged, with its roof collapsed and exposed wooden beams and debris. A motorcycle is parked in the foreground near the damaged building. The sky is bright blue, and power lines are visible overhead.
label: Image
